---
title: "Publications"
editor: source
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Indexed Publications

::: {.pub-index-buttons}
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=OqOPJOEAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate&inst=2230987035966559800){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}
[PubMed](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/?term=Sina+Azadnajafabad&sort=date&size=200){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}
[Scopus](https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=57219389837){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}
[Web of Science](https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/ABC-5770-2020){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}
:::

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| warning: false
#| output: false

# RUN this code before rendering publications.qmd to generate qmd files used later below
source("pubs_extractor_v2.R")
```

## Selected Publications

{{< include _pubs_files/publist_selected.qmd >}}

## Bibliography (peer-reviewed journal articles)
### 2026

{{< include _pubs_files/publist_2026.qmd >}}

### 2025

{{< include _pubs_files/publist_2025.qmd >}}

### 2024

{{< include _pubs_files/publist_2024.qmd >}}

### 2023

{{< include _pubs_files/publist_2023.qmd >}}

### 2022

{{< include _pubs_files/publist_2022.qmd >}}

### 2021

{{< include _pubs_files/publist_2021.qmd >}}

### 2020

{{< include _pubs_files/publist_2020.qmd >}}

## Preprints

{{< include _pubs_files/publist_preprints.qmd >}}

## Published conference abstracts

{{< include _pubs_files/publist_conferences.qmd >}}

## Summary Statistics

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" }

Publication and citation statistics in this section are based on [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=OqOPJOEAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate&inst=2230987035966559800) as of **`r format(Sys.Date(), "%B %d, %Y")`**.

:::

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| warning: false
#| tbl-cap: "Publication and citation statistics"

source("citation_extractor.R")

citation_table

```

## Publications Wordcloud

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| warning: false

source("wordcloud_script.R")

```

![Wordcloud of publications titles](media/5_wordcloud/wordcloud.png){width=500 height=500 fig-align="center"}
